location.office_time_required: occasional in-office for proximal roles; primarily remote

level_signals: 10+ years of experience in strategic partnerships, business development, or a similar growth-focused role
This is an individual contributor role without direct reports
OTE range $213K-$315K depending on state, consistent with Senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10 + years of experience in strategic partnerships, business development, or a similar growth-focused role, ideally in high-growth tech or fintech environments.
must_haves.qualifier: ideally in high-growth tech or fintech environments

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven track record of delivering measurable growth through partnerships—not just managing relationships, but expanding them.
Strong commercial instincts with the ability to assess opportunities and drive deals from ideation to execution.
Understanding of go-to-market strategy development and cross-functional execution.
Excellent relationship-building, communication, and negotiation skills.
Highly self-motivated and results-driven, with a strong sense of ownership and urgency.
Experience navigating fast-paced, ambiguous environments with evolving priorities.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in fintech, e-commerce, or financial services.
Prior experience working with or within high-impact partner ecosystems.

explicitly_excluded: Visa sponsorship is not available for this position.

scope.surface: Named portfolio of existing payments partnerships; Revenue team driving top-line growth through strategic partnerships, eCommerce, in-store, telesales, and the Affirm app
scope.business_model: B2B2C — payments/BNPL platform connecting merchants and consumers
primary_metrics_inferred: On Target Earnings tied to sales incentive (OTE structure)
core_responsibilities: Own and grow a named portfolio of existing payments partnerships, focusing on expanding business value, accelerating revenue, and driving merchant acquisition.
Identify new opportunities within existing partner relationships that align with Affirm's growth objectives.
Execute go-to-market strategies tailored to each partnership, including cross-functional execution plans.
Negotiate partnership amendments and renewals as needed to support evolving business objectives.
Build trusted relationships within partner organizations, from working teams to mid-level leaders.
Monitor and optimize partnership performance using data-driven insights, ensuring alignment with KPIs and strategic goals.
Act as an internal advocate for partners, while upholding a high standard for performance, innovation, and value creation.
Collaborate closely with Product and Sales to support roadmaps and campaigns that enhance the success of strategic partners.

compensation.equity_form: Equity Grade 8; ESPP (employee stock purchase plan); equity rewards mentioned as part of total compensation

green_flags: OTE range disclosed ($213K-$315K depending on state) — transparent pay structure
Remote-first company explicitly stated; role tagged #LI-Remote
Comprehensive benefits including 100% subsidized medical coverage for employee and dependents
Clear individual contributor scope — no ambiguity about people management expectations
Affirm is an established, publicly-traded fintech with clear product-market fit
red_flags: Visa sponsorship explicitly not available — eliminates non-authorized candidates
10+ years minimum experience is a hard floor that narrows the candidate pool significantly
OTE structure implies variable/incentive pay component — base salary not separately disclosed
No equity range disclosed beyond 'Grade 8' — limited transparency on equity value

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from '10+ years', IC designation, and OTE range)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description — BNPL/payments platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
compensation.total_comp_estimate_usd used as proxy for OTE since base is not separately stated
location.cities_listed left empty — JD does not name specific cities for this role
ambiguities: JD states 'Affirm is proud to be a remote-first company' and tags #LI-Remote, but also notes 'Affirmers in proximal roles have the flexibility to work remotely, but will occasionally be required to work out of their assigned Affirm office' — unclear if this role is fully remote or proximal. Treated as remote-us based on #LI-Remote tag.

Compensation is described as OTE (On Target Earnings) including base + sales incentive, but the base/variable split is not disclosed. base_range_usd left null; total_comp_estimate_usd set to OTE range.

10+ years requirement is listed under 'What We're Looking For' with qualifier 'ideally in high-growth tech or fintech environments' — the qualifier softens the industry but not the years. Treated years as hard, industry as soft qualifier.
